review_text:
PUBG Mobile used to be one of the best battle royale games. Simple, intense, and skill-based.

But now every update adds more unnecessary events and features that nobody asked for. Many old players came back because they missed the classic PUBG feeling, but these new events are ruining it again.

Please remember why players loved PUBG in the first place. We don’t need more complicated events. We just want the classic PUBG experience back.
title: Update and new event pubg
